since_last: 40% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.37%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -0.79% · Gold +1.28% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 40% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.37%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.37%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.27%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.92%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.92%, DELL +3.43%, HPE +2.87%, CCJ +2.62%, OKLO +2.20%. Laggards: SKHY -6.38%, GEV -6.28%, MU -3.74%, LRCX -3.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.50% at $124.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.50% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
